items.title: AgentDoG 1.5: A Lightweight and Scalable Alignment Framework for AI Agent Safety and Security
items.summary: A new open-source framework, AgentDoG 1.5, is introduced to enhance the safety and security of AI agents through scalable alignment techniques.

items.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
items.summary: A TechCrunch report highlights a growing trend of developers refusing to work without AI assistance, raising concerns about potential long-term skill degradation and over-reliance.

items.title: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
items.summary: Boston Children's Hospital is leveraging AI technology to analyze complex medical data, leading to the discovery of new diagnoses and improved patient care.

items.title: OmniRetrieval: Unified Retrieval across Heterogeneous Knowledge Sources
items.summary: OmniRetrieval proposes a unified approach to retrieve information efficiently from diverse and heterogeneous knowledge sources, improving RAG systems.

items.title: minWM: A Full-Stack Open-Source Framework for Real-Time Interactive Video World Models
items.summary: minWM is presented as a comprehensive open-source framework designed for building and deploying real-time, interactive video world models.

items.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
items.summary: Anthropic introduces Cowork, a new desktop agent for Claude that allows users to interact with their files and perform tasks without needing any coding knowledge.

items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.summary: Salesforce has launched an enhanced Slackbot AI agent, intensifying its competition with Microsoft and Google in the rapidly expanding workplace AI market.

items.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
items.summary: Google showcases nine practical demonstrations of its advanced Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 models, highlighting their capabilities across various applications.

items.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
items.summary: OpenAI highlights Rosalind Biodefense, an initiative utilizing AI to enhance societal resilience against biological threats and improve biosecurity measures.

items.title: How to Automate Mobile App Testing Without Writing a Single Line of Code
items.summary: This article details a method for automating mobile application testing, making it accessible even for users without coding expertise.

items.title: CollectionLoRA: Collecting 50 Effects in 1 LoRA via Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation
items.summary: Researchers introduce CollectionLoRA, a method that distills 50 different effects into a single LoRA model using multi-teacher on-policy distillation, enhancing model efficiency.

items.title: YoCausal: How Far is Video Generation from World Model? A Causality Perspective
items.summary: This research explores the gap between current video generation techniques and true world models, analyzing the role of causality in achieving more realistic and predictive video synthesis.

items.title: GenClaw: Code-Driven Agentic Image Generation
items.summary: GenClaw introduces a novel approach to image generation where AI agents are driven by code to create images, offering more precise control and complex scene creation.

items.title: The Autonomous "Budget-Bound" Agent: Securing AI with Bedrock AgentCore Payments
items.summary: This article discusses securing AI agents by implementing budget constraints through Bedrock AgentCore Payments, ensuring controlled and accountable autonomous operations.

items.title: EarlyTom: Early Token Compression Completes Fast Video Understanding
items.summary: EarlyTom proposes an efficient method for video understanding by compressing tokens early in the processing pipeline, significantly speeding up analysis without compromising accuracy.
